section.title: DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.Utils Class Reference

listitem.para: static Vector2 SwitchToRectTransform (RectTransform from, RectTransform to)
Converts the anchoredPosition of the first RectTransform to the second RectTransform, taking into consideration offset, anchors and pivot, and returns the new anchoredPosition.

Vector2 DG.Tweening.DOTweenModuleUI.Utils.SwitchToRectTransform (RectTransform from, RectTransform to)[static]
Converts the anchoredPosition of the first RectTransform to the second RectTransform, taking into consideration offset, anchors and pivot, and returns the new anchoredPosition.
